guided_advisories.query_text: I got a call from CBI saying my card is linked to drugs in Mumbai
guided_advisories.verdict_advisory: ⚠️ उच्च जोखिम चेतावनी: यह संदेश डिजिटल अरेस्ट स्कैम और वित्तीय धोखाधड़ी के पैटर्न से मेल खाता है।
guided_advisories.guided_steps:
1. कोई भी पैसा ट्रांसफर न करें।
2. ओटीपी, आधार या बैंक विवरण साझा न करें।
3. स्काइप, ज़ूम या व्हाट्सएप वीडियो कॉल को तुरंत काट दें।
4. राष्ट्रीय साइबर अपराध हेल्पलाइन 1930 पर कॉल करें या www.cybercrime.gov.in पर रिपोर्ट करें।

auto_form_data.evidence_transcript_snippet: I got a call from CBI saying my card is linked to drugs in Mumbai
auto_form_data.recommended_action: Freeze target account, notify Telecom Circle

guided_advisories.query_text: Please transfer money to release lottery funds from KBC portal
guided_advisories.verdict_advisory: ⚠️ HIGH RISK ALERT: This matches typical patterns of digital arrest scams and financial fraud.
guided_advisories.guided_steps:
1. Do NOT transfer any money.
2. Do NOT share OTP, Aadhaar, or Bank credentials.
3. Disconnect any active Skype, Zoom or WhatsApp video calls immediately.
4. Call 1930 (National Cyber Crime Helpline) or report to www.cybercrime.gov.in.

auto_form_data.evidence_transcript_snippet: Please transfer money to release lottery funds from KBC portal
auto_form_data.recommended_action: Freeze target account, notify Telecom Circle

guided_advisories.query_text: TRAI warning message says mobile block in 2 hours link Aadhaar
guided_advisories.verdict_advisory: ⚠️ అధిక ప్రమాద హెచ్చరిక: ఇది డిజిటల్ అరెస్ట్ స్కామ్ మరియు ఆర్థిక మోసాల నమూనాలతో సరిపోలుతోంది.
guided_advisories.guided_steps:
1. ఎలాంటి డబ్బును బదిలీ చేయవద్దు.
2. OTP, ఆధార్ లేదా బ్యాంక్ వివరాలను ఎవరితోనూ పంచుకోవద్దు.
3. స్కైప్, జూమ్ లేదా వాట్సాప్ వీడియో కాల్స్ వెంటనే నిలిపివేయండి.
4. నేషనల్ సైబర్ క్రైమ్ హెల్ప్‌లైన్ 1930 కి కాల్ చేయండి లేదా www.cybercrime.gov.in లో ఫిర్యాదు చేయండి.

auto_form_data.evidence_transcript_snippet: TRAI warning message says mobile block in 2 hours link Aadhaar
auto_form_data.recommended_action: Freeze target account, notify Telecom Circle

guided_advisories.query_text: Urgent package customs clearance fee payment request
guided_advisories.verdict_advisory: ⚠️ அதிக ஆபத்து எச்சரிக்கை: இது வழக்கமான டிஜிட்டல் கைது மோசடி மற்றும் நிதி மோசடி வடிவங்களுடன் ஒத்துப்போகிறது.
guided_advisories.guided_steps:
1. எந்தப் பணத்தையும் அனுப்ப வேண்டாம்.
2. OTP, ஆதார் அல்லது வங்கி விவரங்களைப் பகிர வேண்டாம்.
3. ஸ்கைப், ஜூம் அல்லது வாட்ஸ்அப் வீடியோ அழைப்புகளை உடனே துண்டிக்கவும்.
4. தேசிய சைபர் குற்ற உதவி எண் 1930 ஐ அழைக்கவும் அல்லது www.cybercrime.gov.in இல் புகார் செய்யவும்.

auto_form_data.evidence_transcript_snippet: Urgent package customs clearance fee payment request
auto_form_data.recommended_action: Freeze target account, notify Telecom Circle
